notInstalled: n8n ইনস্টল করা নেই। অনুগ্রহ করে ইনস্টল করুন: npm install -g n8n
N8N_PORT: Port for the n8n web interface (default: 5678)
N8N_HOST: Host name or IP address for the n8n web interface (default: localhost)
N8N_PATH: URL path for the n8n web interface (default: /)
DB_TYPE: Database type: sqlite, postgresdb, mysqldb, mariadb (default: sqlite)
N8N_USER_FOLDER: Custom directory where n8n stores user data (default: ~/.n8n)
N8N_SKIP_OWNER_SETUP: Skip the owner setup wizard on first start (true/false). Only use after the owner account has been created.
N8N_OWNER_EMAIL: Owner account email. If set, FlyEnv will automatically configure this account on first start via the n8n setup API.
N8N_OWNER_PASSWORD: Owner account password. Used with N8N_OWNER_EMAIL to auto-configure the owner account on first start.
ownerResetTip: Deletes the user database so N8N_OWNER_EMAIL / N8N_OWNER_PASSWORD are applied on next start.
ownerResetConfirm: This will delete the n8n user database. All user accounts will be removed (workflows remain). Continue?
ownerResetSuccess: User database reset. Restart n8n to apply new credentials.
ownerResetFailed: Reset failed. Stop n8n first and ensure the data folder is accessible.
N8N_BASIC_AUTH_ACTIVE: [Deprecated - n8n < 1.0 only] Enable HTTP Basic Auth browser popup (true/false). Does NOT affect the web UI login form.
N8N_BASIC_AUTH_USER: [Deprecated - n8n < 1.0 only] Username for HTTP Basic Auth popup. Use the owner setup wizard at localhost:5678 to create web UI login credentials.
N8N_BASIC_AUTH_PASSWORD: [Deprecated - n8n < 1.0 only] Password for HTTP Basic Auth popup. Use the owner setup wizard at localhost:5678 to create web UI login credentials.
N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY: Key used to encrypt credentials in the database
N8N_LOG_LEVEL: Log level: error, warn, info, verbose, debug (default: info)
N8N_LOG_OUTPUT: Log output: console, file, or both (default: console)
EXECUTIONS_PROCESS: Process mode: main or own (default: main)
EXECUTIONS_MODE: Execution mode: regular or queue (default: regular)
usersNoCredentials: Owner credentials (N8N_OWNER_EMAIL / N8N_OWNER_PASSWORD) are not set in the env file. Configure them in the Config tab to use user management.
usersN8nRequired: n8n must be running to manage users
usersDeleteConfirm: Delete user {email}? Their workflows will be transferred to the owner.
usersInviteUrlTip: Share this link with the user to complete their account setup:
usersChangePasswordSuccess: Password changed and saved to env file
usersDataDirTip: Directory where n8n stores its database and files (.n8n folder). Changes take effect on next start.
usersDataDirChanged: Data directory updated. Restart n8n to apply.
usersDataDirScanNone: ডিফল্ট স্থানে কোনো n8n ডেটা ডিরেক্টরি পাওয়া যায়নি।
